queries.query: SELECT ii.INVOICE_ITEM_ID, ii.INVOICE_ID, ii.PRODUCT_ID, ii.QUANTITY, ii.UNIT_PRICE, ii.LINE_TOTAL, p.PRODUCT_NAME, p.DESCRIPTION FROM HS_BILL_INVOICE_ITEMS ii INNER JOIN HS_BILL_PRODUCTS p ON p.PRODUCT_ID = ii.PRODUCT_ID WHERE ii.INVOICE_ID = @InvoiceId
INSERT INTO HS_BILL_INVOICE_ITEMS (INVOICE_ID, PRODUCT_ID, QUANTITY, UNIT_PRICE) VALUES (@InvoiceId, @ProductId, @Quantity, @UnitPrice)
UPDATE HS_BILL_INVOICE_ITEMS SET PRODUCT_ID = @ProductId, QUANTITY = @Quantity, UNIT_PRICE = @UnitPrice WHERE INVOICE_ITEM_ID = @InvoiceItemId
SELECT ISNULL(SUM(LINE_TOTAL), 0) AS INVOICE_TOTAL FROM HS_BILL_INVOICE_ITEMS WHERE INVOICE_ID = @InvoiceId
